basic_details.job_title: IHMCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Manager, Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Highways Management Company Limited (IHMCL) has published the Various Posts Notification 2026 under Advt. No. IHMCL/HR/Recruit./02/2026/03 on its ihmcl.co.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 8 positions including Lead Systems Engineer, IT & Cybersecurity Architect, Managers, and Assistant Manager (Finance). Candidates within the age range of 21 to 45 years (post-wise variation) and holding qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech, MCA, MBA, or CA with relevant experience are eligible to apply online. The application process started on 18 April 2026 and will remain open until 17 May 2026, a

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for most posts, 45 for Lead IT & Cybersecurity Architect, 21-30 for Assistant Manager (Finance).
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 40 years for most posts. Maximum age limit is 45 years for Lead IT & Cybersecurity Architect. Age limit for Assistant Manager (Finance) is between 21 to 30 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech (min 60%), MCA (min 60%), MBA, Chartered Accountant (CA), 6 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Lead Systems Engineer (ITS): Bachelor's Degree in Engineering in Information Technology/Computer Science/Electronics and Communications/Data Science/Artificial Intelligence (min 60%) + 6 years experience in national-scale tolling/digital infra/tolling architecture (FASTag/ETC/MLFF). Lead IT & Cybersecurity Architect: Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering in Computer Science/Information Technology/Electronics and Communication/Electrical/Internet of Things/Data Science & AI/Artificial Intelligence or MCA (min 60%) + 6 years experience in IT infrastructure/Networks/Systems Architecture/Cybersecurity. Manager (Marketing & Business Development): Bachelor’s Degree (min 60%) + Post Graduate/Master's in Business Administration (MBA) with specialization in Marketing + 6 years experience in marketing/Business Development/Brand strategy/Public Outreach. Manager (Grievance Redressal & Customer Services): Bachelor's Degree (min 60%) + Masters in Business Administration (MBA) with specialization in Operations/CRM + 6 years experience in citizen service/Emergency Response/Digital Transaction Ecosystems/24x7 citizen service. Assistant Manager (Finance): Chartered Accountants (CA) from Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) - marks of both groups of Final Exam in 2024 and 2025 under new scheme.

salary_details.details: Lead Systems Engineer (ITS), Lead IT & Cybersecurity Architect, Manager (Marketing & Business Development), Manager (Grievance Redressal & Customer Services): Rs.70,000-2,00,000/- (E-4 Grade) Per Month Assistant Manager (Finance): Rs.50,000-1,60,000/- (E-2 Grade) Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting of Applications Interview (Lateral Induction Posts) Merit List based on CA Final Marks (Finance Post)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IHMCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IHMCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IHMCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications for IHMCL Recruitment 2026 is 17 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IHMCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for various posts in the Indian Highways Management Company Limited (IHMCL) Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are spread across different specialized roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager (Finance) post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Manager (Finance) post, candidates must be Chartered Accountants (CA) from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI). They need to have marks from both groups of the Final Exam in 2024 and 2025 under the new scheme.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for IHMCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IHMCL Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Lead IT & Cybersecurity Architect post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Lead IT & Cybersecurity Architect post is 45 years. For most other posts, the maximum age limit is 40 years, with specific limits for Assistant Manager (Finance).

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the Manager posts in IHMCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary for the Manager posts (Marketing & Business Development and Grievance Redressal & Customer Services) is in the range of Rs.70,000 to Rs.2,00,000 per month, falling under the E-4 Grade.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Manager (Finance) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Manager (Finance) post will be based on a Merit List prepared from the CA Final Marks. This indicates a strong emphasis on academic performance in the final CA examinations.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Delhi. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements or if candidates from other regions are also eligible.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for IHMCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application for IHMCL Recruitment 2026 must be submitted in online mode only. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided application link to fill out and submit their forms.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum relevant experience required for most of the managerial posts?
faq.answer: For most of the managerial posts, including Lead Systems Engineer, Lead IT & Cybersecurity Architect, Manager (Marketing & Business Development), and Manager (Grievance Redressal & Customer Services), a minimum of 6 years of relevant experience is required.
